race.comment: WYANDRA (8) is racing well and gets his ideal chance to break through. He's placed in his past three, battling on well for third at Pakenham last time in a high rating maiden behind an impressive winner. Comes back a notch here and maps for every hope, go close. PRIVATEER (11) has had a few chances but is racing consistently, not far away at Kyneton latest having just missed at Mornington prior. She'll roll forward and give a sight. ASTERN FIGHT (1) is a gelding by Astern on debut for the Dabernig yard who has jumped out well. Meech booked, keep an eye on the betting. SWIFT ENDORSEMENT (4) is off a long spell but has ability, watch the market, as goes for SIRIUSLY BRIGHT (12) on debut for the Matt Laurie yard.
